title: excoecaria stylaris
intro: Excoecaria stylaris, also known as the Yellow Oleander, is a plant species native to tropical and subtropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Excoecaria stylaris include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Excoecaria stylaris is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or ointments, although its use should be carefully monitored due to its potential toxicity and side effects.
